detail.description:
🎹 Music Piano 7: The Ultimate Piano Tiles Rush Game! 🎵

Love tapping to trending songs? Music Piano 7 is the addictive rhythm game where you tap piano tiles to your favorite Pop, K-pop, EDM, Hip-Hop, and R&B hits. Perfect for music lovers and rhythm game fans!

🎮 HOW TO PLAY PIANO TILES
- Tap the Tiles: Tap black and white tiles to the beat
- Hold the Rhythm: Press and hold long tiles for continuous melody
- Don't Miss: Keep perfect timing for 3-star scores!
- Challenge Mode: Test your speed
detail.recentChanges:
What's New:
- Smoother Gameplay: Optimized visuals and performance for a flawless rhythm experience!
- Bug Fixes: Minor tweaks for better stability.
Keep jamming and let us know what you think! 🎶
